subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, my Master, my God, my Hope! These are servants who have heard the Call and have responded with all loyalty and fidelity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و منائی و الهی و رجائی هولاء عباد سمعوا الندآء و لبوا بکل ولاء و وفاء و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @Shrines and Holy places, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @humility; meekness; lowliness
